narrative.text_content: Voiceover reads father’s letter line “Truth lies between wolf howl and rust.” State Tracker UI faintly pulses (Moral: Uncertain; Alliance: None; Forest Health: Declining). Council guardsman approaches, delivers secret order. Narrative Funnel begins — two choices presented visually as split-screen vignettes (A: forest path, B: wolf howls).

cinematography.environment_desc: A desolate village square framed by a massive iron cross; ground scorched, ash-dusted. Sulphur wind whips dust across cracked stone. In background: skeletal trees on horizon.
cinematography.lighting: Harsh amber sunlight filtered through ochre haze; long shadows from crossbeams. Wind carries flickers of ember glow.
cinematography.camera_angle: Wide establishing shot from low angle—cross silhouetted against burning sky. Push-in to medium close-up of protagonist (you) standing defiantly, red cloak flaring.
cinematography.image_prompt: Desolate village square with massive iron cross, ash-dusted ground, sulphur wind, skeletal trees on horizon, protagonist in red cloak with council guardsman approaching
